isolation.homeStrategy: mktemp HOME used for all assertions; read-only RC test confined to temp HOME/.zshrc

assertions.title: LAB_PATH environment variable sets default root

steps.action: Run `lab exec clone https://github.com/user/repo` with LAB_PATH set to temp custom root
steps.expected: Script path references custom LAB_PATH root

steps.action: Run `lab --and-exit exec` with LAB_PATH set to non-existent nested temp path
steps.observed: command exited 1 (expected for --and-exit no selection) and LAB_PATH directory existed after invocation

assertions.title: cd script touches then cds to directory

steps.action: Create an existing entry under temp LAB_PATH and run `lab --and-keys '\r' exec`
steps.observed: stdout emitted touch + echo + cd chain for selected existing directory

assertions.title: mkdir script creates then cds to directory

steps.action: Run `lab --and-keys 'newproj\r' exec` in empty temp LAB_PATH
steps.observed: stdout emitted mkdir -p + touch + echo + cd chain for new directory

assertions.title: All scripts echo the final path

steps.observed: cd, mkdir, clone, and worktree outputs all included `echo '<path>'`

steps.action: Attempt rename and graduate script surfaces via `lab exec rename ...` and `lab exec graduate ...`
steps.expected: rename and graduate script outputs including final-path echo
steps.observed: both commands exited 1 with `lab: TUI selector not yet implemented (milestone 2)` and no script output

assertions.issues: Rename and graduate script surfaces were not available; unable to confirm required final-path echo for those script types.

assertions.title: Clone script emits informational echo before git clone

steps.expected: stdout has informational `echo` about using git clone before `git clone` command
steps.observed: output contained `echo 'Using git clone...'` line before `git clone ...` line

steps.expected: non-zero exit and parse error on stderr
steps.observed: exit code 1 and stderr `Error: Unable to parse git URI: not-a-valid-uri`

assertions.title: Install with read-only RC file warns

steps.action: Create temp HOME/.zshrc, set mode 0444, run `lab install` with SHELL=/bin/zsh
steps.observed: stderr warned `.zshrc is read-only, skipping.` and command exited 1
